creator: kmachine@free.fr
text:
(In reply to Robert Clausecker from comment #1)
I have this:

- Added the option to use 'gpart show' instead of 'sysctl kern.disks' to list the disks.
- Added the option to not check the root file system for updating/checking the BIOS loaders.
- Polished some outputs.
- Changed man page accordingly to the new options and added sections Capabilities and Limitations.
